CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Particular Allegations In Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Particular Allegations In Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEPHEN R. CSENGERI, ESQ. of Csengeri Law Offices, Tel No. 310-872-7468 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Susan Braun;
Atty. LINDA SVITAK, ESQ. of Faegre Baker Daniels, LLP, Tel No. 612-766-8360 appearing telephonically for Defendant Zimmer, Inc.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ZIMMER INC.'S Motion To Strike Particular Allegations In Plaintiffs Complaint is granted with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEPHEN R. CSENGERI, ESQ. of Csengeri Law Offices, Tel No. 310-872-7468 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Susan Braun;
Atty. LINDA SVITAK, ESQ. of Faegre Baker Daniels, LLP, Tel No. 612-766-8360 appearing telephonically for Defendant Zimmer, Inc.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ZIMMER INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ZIMMER INC., AND ZIMMER FEGAN & MALONEY, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR THE ADMISSION OF LINDA SVITAK TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. The application complies with CRC 9.40. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
